title: Governor Interacts with Chite Lui Coordination Committee and PWD Officials on Chite River Restoration
content:
41/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 27th April, 2026:Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), interacted with the Save Chite Lui Coordination Committee and Public Works Department (PWD) officials at Lok Bhavan on Monday afternoon. As patron of the committee, the Governor received a detailed briefing on new project under Phase 2 of the Save Chite Lui Action Plan, which targets the conservation and restoration of the Chite River.

Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh stressed the need for collective, sustained action to rejuvenate the river. He called for strategic check gates and small dams to systematically remove waste, alongside robust plantation drives along the banks. He also urged stronger coordination among stakeholders, including communities, NGOs, and departments and advised simplifying the Detailed Project Report (DPR) for practicality and achievability. The Governor offered suggestions and reaffirmed his full support for the new project's success.

Officials presented an overview via PowerPoint, highlighting ongoing efforts in collaboration with the Department of Environment, Forests & Climate Change and Public Works Department on Phase 2 of the Save Chite Lui Action Plan.

Attendees included Pu Rochamliana, General Secretary, Save Chite Lui Coordination Committee and Er. Lalrinngheta, SE with other senior PWD officials.

Attachment

title: Larsap-in Save Chite Lui Coordination Committee leh PWD hotute a kawm
content:
302/2026-2027

Aizawl the 27th April, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan Save Chite Lui Coordination Committee leh PWD hotute chuan Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), Patron, Save Chite Lui Coordination Committee ni bawk chu Lok Bhavan, Aizawlah hmuin Save Chite Lui Action Plan Phase 2 (Lui cheibawl leh chei that) hnuaia project thar tur chungchang an hrilh fiah.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Chite Lui humhalh leh cheibawl kawngah theihtawp chhuaha tanrual a pawimawh takzet thu sawiin, Chite lui chu khawpui thli luanluhna ber anih avangin checkgate/ dam-te a khat tawka daha bawlhhlawh tangte thenfai zel a tul thu a sawi a. Lui kama awmze nei taka thingphun a tul thu sawiin, a chhehvela awm vengte, NGO leh department-te nen thawhhona mumal tak neih a pawimawh thu a sawi a. DRP tihhlawhtlin theih ngei tur leh hriat thiam awlsam siam tum turin a chah nghal bawk.

Save Chite Lui Coordination Committee-te hian PWD leh Nodal Department, Environment, Forests & Climate Change Department-te nen tangkawpin Aizawl khawpui huamchhunga lui pawimawh tak Chite Lui cheibawl leh chei that hna project an kalpui mek a ni.

He hunah hian Save Chite Lui Coordination Committee leh PWD hotute chuan Save Chite Lui Action Plan Phase 2 chungchang PowerPoint Presentation hmangin an sawi fiah a. Larsap chuan thurawn hrang hrangte pein, he project thar hlawhtlin nan hian theihtawp chhuah a tum thu a hrilh a ni.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian Save Chite Lui Coordination Committee aiawhin Pu Rochamliana, Gen Secretary, PWD atangin Er. Lalrinngheta, SE leh hotu dangte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: UNION MINISTER OF STATE FOR HOME AFFAIRS AIZAWL-AH LO ZIN
content:
301/2026-2027

Aizawl, 27th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Union Minister of State for Home Affairs Pu Bandi Sanjay Kumar chuan ni hnih cham turin Aizawl a lo thleng a, Lengpui Airportah Dr. Andrew H. Vanlaldika, Addl. Secretary, Home Department leh Pi C. Lalremruati, Protocol Officer ten an lo hmuak a ni.

Pu Bandi Sanjay Kumar hian 23 Sector Headquarters, Assam Rfles, Khatlaah chhunchaw a ei a, hemi zawh hian MINECO Conference Hall-ah Mizoram sawrkar deparrtment hrang hrang hotute nen an inkawm a ni. He hunah hian Union Minister of State Pu Bandi chuan hmun hla tak atang in harsatna leh mamawhte ngaithla turin ka lo kal vang vang a, inthlahrung hauh lova Mizoram hmasawnna tur atana an vei leh ngaih pawimawhte sawi turin sawrkar official pawimawh kalkhawmte a chah a ni.

He inkawmhona hi Chief Secretary mawhphurhna chelh lailawktu Pu R. Zarzosanga’n a kaihruai a, Home Secretary Pu David Lalthantluanga leh Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare Secretary Pi Ramdinliani ten power presentation pe in an department hnuaia Centrally Sponsored Scheme kalpui mekte sawifiahin, an hlawhtlinna bakah harsatna an tawhte leh a sutkian dan turte an sawifiah nghal bawk a, hemi hnu hian sawrkar department hrang hrang aiawh a lo kalte chu an department hnuaia hmalakna, harsatna leh mamawhte uluk takin an sawiho nghal a, Union Minister of State hian report kimchang taka siam a, a hnena thehlut turin thurawn a pe a, a tul ang anga bawhzui a nih tur thu a sawi a ni.

He inkawmhonaah hian BSF leh 23 Assam Rifles DIG te ve ve pawh telin, Mizoram depa India ramri (Myanmar leh Bangladesh) a venhimna kenkawh chungchangte, ramri hung chungchangte leh ramri depa thingtlang khuate Vibrant Villages Programme kaltlanga tihchangtlun dan turte report an pe a ni. Mizoram sawrkar officials te pawhin thil pawimawh chi hrang hrang – khualzin hip tam lehzual tura hmalak dan turte, India ram pawn atanga khualzin lo lut te’n Restricted Area Permit/Protected Area Permit chungchanga harsatna an tawh sutkian sak a tul thute, sector hrang hranga Mizoram dinhmun leh Vikshit Bharat (developed India) 2047 dungthula Mizoram tihhmasawnna tur “Transformed Mizoram Vision 2047” atana ruahmanna leh tihhlawhtlin turte sawiho a ni bawk.

Sawrkar mipawimawhte nen an inkawm zawh hnu hian Union Home Minister of State hian Mizoram Police Headquarters, Khatla tlawhin GS Arya Mess-ah Mizoram Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga’n lo mikhualin thingpui a inpui a ni.

Ruahman dan chuan Pu Bandi hian naktukah video conferencing (VC) hmangin Siaha district-a sawrkar hotu pawimawhte a kawm ang a, VC hmang vek hian khawtlang aiawhte leh NGO aiawhte a kawm bawk ang.

Vawiina Mizoram sawrkar hotute nen an inkawmnaah hian Union Home Minister hi a Private Secretary Andra Vamsi, IAS, Personal Assistant Parimala Srinivas leh Public relations Officer Pasunuru Madhu ten an tawiawm a, Mizoram sawrkar officialte hi Chief Secretary mawhphurhna chelh lailawktu Pu R. Zarzosanga’n hovin Mizoram DGP bakah sawrkar department hrang hrang Home, Planning, School Education, Agricultuture & Farmers’ Welfare, Horticulture, Commerce & Industries, Excise & Narcotics, Finance, Transport changtu Secretary te, IG of Prisons bakah Health & Family Welfare, PWD, Tourism, Forensic Science Laboratory hotute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: SCC PERFORMANCE THLIRLETNA NEIH A NI
content:
300/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 27th April 2026 :Vawiin khan Sawhthing lakkhawm leh hralh chungchangah District Agriculture marketing Committee Chairman Pu Paul L. Khuma hovin Serchhip District-a Secondary Collection Centre (SCC) hrang hrangte hnathawh dan leh hmasawnnate thlirletna DC Meeting Hall-ah neih a ni a, Serchhip District-a SCC Supervisor theuhte he thilrletna hunah hian an tel a ni.

Serchhip District-ah hian SCC pariat (8) - Serchhip, Chhingchhip, Khawlailung, Thenzawl, E. Lungdar, N. Vanlaiphai, leh Lungpho leh Mualchengah te a awm a; February 2026 atanga Sawhthing lakkhawm hna thawh tan a nih atanga April ni 18, 2026 thlenga report tlangpui chu hetiang hi a ni :

1.Thenzawl: Bag 10,901 dah luh niin, Kg 3,21,867 an hralh tawh a, godown-ah bag 2,535 a la bang.

2.Serchhip: Bag 8,465 dah luh a ni a, Kg 1,65,446 hralh tawhin, godown-ah bag 2,476 a la bang.

3.Lungpho: Bag 7,202 dah luh a ni a, Kg 1,81,650 hralh tawhin, godown-ah bag 889 a la bang.

4.Chhingchhip: Bag 5,508 dah luh a ni a, Kg 2,59,448 hralh tawhin, godown-ah bag 214 a la bang.

5.Mualcheng: Bag 4,937 dah luh a ni a, Kg 43,585 hralh tawhin, godown-ah bag 1,315 a la bang.

6.Khawlailung: Bag 3,613 dah luh a ni a, Kg 1,34,612 hralh tawhin, godown-ah eng mah bang a awm tawh lo.

7.E. Lungdar: Bag 1,590 dah luh a ni a, harsatna eng eng emaw avangin hralh chhuah a la ni lo va, RWFPC te nen a rang lama hralh chhuah ve thuai a nih theih nan hma lakzui nghal tura rel a ni.

8.N. Vanlaiphai: N. Vanlaiphai SCC hi vawiin thutkhawmnaah hian an tel loh avangin report hriat theih a ni rih lo.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Buffer Stock chungchangte, E. Lungdara harsatna an hmachhawn chungchangte leh a chinfel dan turte sawi ho a ni bawk a; Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan SCC supervisors-te hmalakna fakawm a tih thu sawiin, theihtawp chhuahtlang zel turin a sawm a ni.

title: AMC, 2026 INTHLAPUI RESULT PUAN FEL A NI TA
content:
299/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 27thApril, 2026:Vawiin khan boruak muanawm tak hnuaiahAizawl Municipal Corporation (AMC),2026 Inthlanpui  neih zawh taka vote tla te chu tluang taka chhiar zawh a ni ta. Aizawl Municipal Corporation(AMC) chhungah hian Ward 19 awmin,   Ward  la tam ber, ZPM chuan Ward 17 an la a, MNF leh Congress party in Ward 1 ve ve an la bawk. Vote hi tukin zing dar 8:00atang khan Aizawl Deputy Commissioner’s Office-ah chhiar tan a ni a. Counting Hall 4-ah AMC  Ward 19-a vote tla te hi chhiar a ni.Vote hi tlai lam dar 2:00 vel khan chhiar zawh a ni.

AMC inthlanpuiah hian vote 2,39,985 awmin , vote 1,50,638 a tla a,vote tlazat hi za zel-ah 62.77 a ni. Ward –II, IV, V, XI, XII leh XVII te hi hmeichhe tana reserved ward an ni.

General Observer te  leh Political Party aiawh te  telpui leh hriatpuina hnuaiah  EVM te hi Strong Room atanga lak chhuah a, vote chhiar zawha dah luh leh vek a ni.

title: SAWHTHING LEI LEH HRALH CHUNGCHANG SAWI HO
content:
298/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, 27th April 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Bawrhsap leh DAMC Chairman ni bawk Pu Paul L. Khuma kaihhruaina hnuaiah Serchhip District Agriculture Marketing Committee (DAMC) leh Ropuiliani Women Farmers' Producer Company (RWFPC) te chuan sawhthing lei leh hralh chungchanga thawh hona neih dan tur an sawi ho.

He sawi honaah hian RWFPC Chief Executive Officer Pu Henry Saingura chuan Mizoram District 7-a sawhthing lei turin hma an lak mek thu a sawi a, bultanna atan Serchhip District chu an thlan thu a sawi. Ropuiliani Company-in loneitute thlai thar - sawhthing, aieng, leh hmarcha-an lei thin dan kalphungte tarlangin, sorkar flagship programme 'Bana Kaih' hnuaiah sawhthing chak zawka lei a nih theih nana sorkar hmalakna tichaktu ni tura an thawh mek thu a sawi bawk.

Serchhip District Secondary Collection Centre-a supervisor-te nena thawh hona tha zawk neih dan tur leh harsatna awm thei hrang hrangte he hunah hian sawi ho a ni a. RWFPC te hian SCC thenkhat, sawhthing lei leh hralh kawnga harsatna awm theihna hmun - E. Lungdar, Mualcheng, Lungpho, Chhingchhip, leh Serchhip-ah te sawhthing lei hna hi thawk tan turin ruahmanna siam a ni a. Sawhthing an leina record felfai tak siamin SCC Supervisors-te hnenah an thehlutthin dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB DC HOVIN CENSUS 2027 CHUNGCHANGAH PRESS MEET NEIH A NI
content:
297/2026-2027

Kolasib, 27th April, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan DC Conference Hall, Kolasib-ah Kolasib Deputy Commissioner leh Principal Census Officer ni bawk Pu H. Dolianbuaia hovin Census of India 2027 kalpui mek chungchangah Mizoram Journalists' Association (MJA) Kolasib District member-te nen Press Meet neih a ni.

DC Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan Census pawimawhna leh kalphung sawifiahin, hei hi India ram puma chhiarpui (census) vawi 16-na tur a nih thu leh, India-in zalenna a hmuh hnua vawi 8-na tur a nih thu a sawi. Kuminah hian he chhiarpui hi hlawm hnih (Phase I leh Phase II) a thenin kalpui a ni dawn a. Phase I (House Listing leh Housing Census) chu April 16 atanga May 15 chhungin neih mek a ni a. Phase II (Population Enumeration) chu kum thar February 2027 atanga neih tan a ni ang. Phase II ah hian mipuite dinhmun chipchiar zawk - eizawnna, zirna, pem lut leh chhuak (migration), naupiang zat (fertility) leh thil dangte lakkhawm a ni dawn a ni.

Chhiarpui hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih theih nan thawktu tur chi hrang hrang ruat fel an nih tawh thu leh uluk taka training pek an nih thu a sawi a. Chhiarpui neih mekah harsatna tlem a zawng a awm thu sawiin DC chuan, sakhaw thil leh chhan hrang hrang vanga chhiarpui a tel duhlo an awm zeuh thin thu a tarlang a. Mahse, census chu mihring zat leh dinhmun chhiarna mai a nih a, sakhua leh thil dangte nena inzawmna a neih loh avangin hlauhthawn tur a awm loh thu mipuite hriatthiam tira hrilhfiah zel turin thawktute chu chah an nih thu a sawi bawk.

Assam leh Mizoram ramri chungchanga harsatna awm, Google Map-a Mizoram ram thenkhat Assam anga a lang chu Census Directorate-ah thlen a nih tawh thu leh an chhanna nghah mek a nih thu DC chuan a tarlang a. DC chuan chanchinbumite chu Census pawimawhna mipuite hnena thehdarh tur leh, thu dik leh rintlak thehdarh thin turin a ngen nghal a ni.

Press Meet-ah hian chanchinbumite zawhna hrang hrangte chu DC leh official dang ten an chhang nghal a ni.

He hunah hian Kolasib DC bakah , Addl. DC Pi B. Malsawmtluangi, Pu H Lalramliana , Kolasib SDO Sadar, Kawnpui SDO Dr. Doris Lalrinawmi leh Bairabi SDO Pu Chinlianmanga te leh District Information & Public Relations Officer leh MJA Kolasib members te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH DISTRICT LEVEL NARCO CO-ORDINATION CENTRE (NCORD) MEETING NEIH A NI
content:
296/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 27th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana, NCORD Chairman ni bawk kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah April thla atan Khawzawl District NCORD meeting neih a ni a. NCORD meeting hmasaa thurel bawhzuinate thlir let niin, hma lak zel dan tur sawiho a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan sawrkarin a phut angin Khawzawl district-a thla tin NCORD meeting an nei thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Ruihhlo do leh drugs man kawngah Khawzawl police leh END-te thawhrimna chu fakawm a tih thu sawiin, an thahnemngaihna leh inpekna avangin lawmthu a sawi a. Mizoram district hrang hrang zingah Khawzawl chu kuhva rah tawlhruk man tam ber an ni tih tarlangin, kuhva rah tawlhruk hian kuthnathawkte eizawnna a tihbuai avangin a do kawngah theihtawp chhuah zel a pawimawh thu a sawi.

Khawzawl SP Pu F. Lalbiakzauva, NCORD Member Convener ni bawk hnen atangin Khawzawl district chhunga drugs man dan report ngaihthlak a ni a. Kumin 2026-ah hian ND&PS case 7 ziahluh tawh niin, heng kaihnawihah hian mi 10 man an ni a, Heroin gram 329, Rs. 65,80,000 hu leh Meth  kg 13.87, Rs. 11,09,60,000 hu man a ni tawh a. Mizoram Liqour (Prohibition) Amendement Act, 2025 hnuaiah case 11 ziah luh tawh ni bawkin, NGO-te nen ruihhlo do kawngah thawhhona tha tak an nei tih SP chuan a tarlang.

Zuk leh hmuam do kawnga hmalaknate pawh ngaihthlak niin, zirna in bul hnaih, 100 yards (feet 300) chhung chu zuk leh hmuam fihlimna (Tobacco-Free Zone) a ni a, he hmunah hian vaihlo thil hralh leh hman khap tlat a nih angin, Khawzawl district chhunga school hrang hrangahte 100 yard chin chhinchhiana ‘yellow line’ siam a ni a. April thla chhung hian Khawzawl Vengsang Presbyterian Kohhran NPSS-ah ruihhlo do awareness neih a ni dawn a, May thla-ah Biate khua-ah awareness nei tura ruahmanna siam a ni bawk.

Khawzawl district chhunga drug-free village (ruihhlo awm lohna) atana thlan Tlangmawi khua chu ruihhlo lakah an fihlim ngei em tih endikna (joint inspection and verification) pawh May thla-a neih tura rel a ni. Khawzawl district hi Mizoram chhunga NCORD dedicated helpline number nei awm chhun a ni a, a number chu 8119080266 niin, hemi number-ah hian mipuite chu ruihhlo kaihnawih thil reng reng report tura ngen an ni.

Attachment

title: SIAHA DISTRICT LEVEL MONITORING CELL-AN ṬHUKHAWM
content:
295/2026-2027

Dated Siaha, April 27, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 khan DC Office Chamber, Siahaah District Level Monitoring Cell-an ṭhukhawm a, District Level Monitoring Cell Chairman leh District Bawrhsap nibawk Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte chuan hun hman a kaihhruai.

Chairman chuan member kal khawmte lawmna thu sawiin, Mizoram sawrkarin District Level Monitoring Cell-te thuam ṭhaa tichak (reconstitute) tura hma a lakna kal zelah kokim zawka meeting koh a nih thu leh mipuite tana thawktu annih angin eirawngbawlna gas (LPG) leh tuialhthei (POL) Siaha district tana lo kal chu hmun danga pawhpen leh chheprelh emaw man to zawka hralh duhna emaw avanga dan kalha thiltih a awm loh nan lungrual taka thawhho a ṭul thu a sawi.

DCSO leh Member Secretary, District Level Monitoring Cell nibawk Pu M. Vanlalduata chuan ni tin Mizoram sawrkar food, civil supplies & consumer affairs department-ah district chhunga LPG leh POL stock zat thehluh (report) ziah ṭhin anih thu leh LPG bikah chuan commercial mamawhte tan DCSO hnenah dilna ziah tur a ni a, form siamsa hmangin state-ah dilna thawn phei niin state lamin phalna an pek hnuah chiah pekchhuak theih anih thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin ṭhutkhawmah hian member-te an tel kim hle a, chungte chu: Siaha leh Tipa LPG Distributor, All Mizoram Petroleum Dealers Association aiawh leh District Consumer Union aiawh an ni a, harsatna an tawh hrang hrang an sawi bawk. Chairman Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte chuan, district level-a hmalakna tur hrang hrang (term of reference) tarlangin, member-te chu mipakhatin hlawkna a telna tur aiin mipui nawlpuiin an chhawr ṭangkai theih dan tur zawnga hmalakna kalpui tur leh endikna kalpuitu tur nichunga dan phal loh anga chet chu thil inhmeh lo anih avangin dan kalhin tu mah che lo turin a chah bawk. Chairman-in lawmthu sawina a nei a, ṭhutkhawm ṭin a ni.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB DC IN GOVERNOR'S DISCRETIONARY GRANT ATANGIN TANPUINA SUM SEM
content:
294/2026-2027

Kolasib, 27th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Deputy Commissioner Office Chamber-ah Kolasib DC Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan Kolasib District chhunga ruihhlo ngaite enkawlna leh naupang fahrah enkawlna (Homes/Centres) hrang hrang pali (4) hnenah Mizoram Governor's Discretionary Grant atanga tanpuina sum a sem.

He tanpuina sum hi Rs. 25,000/- theuh niin, a dawngtute chu - Director, TNT Kolasib; Superintendent, Audrene Scism, Kolasib; Officer In-Charge, The Salvation Army Enna In (Boys Home); leh Superintendent, Omega Centre, Bairabi te an ni.

Tanpuina sum semna hunah hian Kolasib DC Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan thu sawiin, nu leh pa nei lo fahrahte leh ruihhlo (drugs leh zu) bawia tangte chhanchhuah leh enkawlna kawnga heng Home hrang hrangten hna tha tak an thawk thin chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Sum leh pai hmuh tur a vangin, harsatna tam tak karah pawh theihtawp chhuaha hna an thawh thin avangin fakawm a tih thu a tarlang. Heng Home hrang hrang kaltlang hian mi tam takin nun thar an neih phah thin a ni tiin, an hmabakah duhsakna a hlan bawk a ni.

Tanpuina sum dawngtute hian sawrkar leh DC chungah lawmthu an sawi a. An hmunhmaa harsatna an tawh mek te, a bikin tui lak (water connection) leh mamawh dang an neih te chu DC hnenah hian an thlen nghal a. DC chuan an harsatna thlente chu a remchan dana  hmalakpui a, amah ngei pawh in hun remchang ah heng home te hi la tlawh a tum thu a sawi bawk.

Attachment

title: TRAFFIC ENFORCEMENT TASK FORCE AND CLEAN LAWNGTLAI COMMITTEES CONVENE UNDER STANDUP LAWNGTLAI PROGRAMME IN LAWNGTLAI
content:
40/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 27th April 2026:A meeting of the Traffic Enforcement Task Force Committee and Clean Lawngtlai Committee under the Standup Lawngtlai Programme (Tho Law Dir Tuah) was held today at the Chief Executive Member’s Conference Hall. The meeting was chaired by the Deputy Commissioner of Lawngtlai,Shri Donny Lalruatsanga.

In his opening remarks,Shri Donny Lalruatsanga expressed appreciation to all participants. He emphasized the importance of various committees in successfully implementing the Standup Lawngtlai Programme, particularly in the areas of traffic management, cleanliness, and town beautification. He stressed that stronger and more active measures are required in these sectors. He also assured that both the District Administration and LADC would continue to put in their best efforts for the overall development of Lawngtlai town. He further called upon Village Councils (VCs), NGOs, churches, and the general public to actively cooperate with the government.

Shri C. Lalsawmzuala, Chief Executive Member of LADC, stated that efforts must continue to give Lawngtlai a new look and usher in a new phase of development. He highlighted that urban development requires careful planning and a sense of responsibility, urging all concerned stakeholders to contribute their best efforts. He also invited individuals, organizations, localities, and churches to actively participate in the development process.

During the meeting, various strategies for the development of Lawngtlai town were discussed.Shri C. Lawmsangzuala, Sanitation Officer, LADC, delivered a PowerPoint presentation on “Beautification and Zero Waste Corner of Lawngtlai Town.” Smt Margaret J. Vanlalremmawii, DPO, UD&PA, also presented ongoing and proposed initiatives under the Government of Mizoram.

The meeting highlighted the importance of strengthening public awareness on cleanliness and hygiene. It was suggested that Village Councils and YLA should take a proactive role in spreading awareness at the locality level. Emphasis was laid on systematic awareness campaigns, installation of more dustbins, establishment of zero waste corners, fencing, street railings, and construction of public seating areas. Proper signage and organized beautification of important locations, streets, and entry/exit points were also discussed.

On traffic management, presentations were made by Shri David J. Byhnadaolai, Additional Superintendent of Police, and Shri H.C. Vanlalruatpuia, Transport Officer, LADC. Discussions included enforcement of parking regulations, joint inspections to monitor violations, and stricter adherence to traffic rules. It was noted that many drivers lack proper knowledge of traffic regulations, and therefore awareness and stricter licensing processes were deemed necessary.

The issue of motor workshops congesting the town area was also discussed, with a proposal to relocate them to the KMMTP road. The meeting agreed that regular monthly inspections should be carried out to review progress on all initiatives.

The meeting was attended by members of both committees and invited participants. The session concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Shri  K. Lalthanzara, ES, LADC.

Attachment

title: STANDUP LAWNGTLAI PROGRAMME (THO LAW DIR TUAH) HNUAIA TRAFFIC ENFORCEMENT TASK FORCE COMMITTTEE LEH CLEAN LAWNGTLAI COMMITTEE TEN THUTKHAWM NEI
content:
293/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 27th April 2026 :Vawiin khan 'Standup Lawngtlai Programme' hnuaia ' Traffic Enforcement Task Force Commitee' leh 'Clean Lawngtlai Committee' chuan Chief Executive Member's Conference Hall-ah thutkhawm an nei a. Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan a kaihruai.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei a. Lawngtlai khawpui hmasawnna tura din ' Tho law dir tuah' (Standup Lawngtlai) chak taka kalpui turin Committee- peng hrang hrangte an pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, a bik takin Traffic, Faina leh khawpui cheimawi lamah nasa zawka hmalak a tul hle a ni, a ti. Hmasawnna kawngah Lawngtlai khawpuiin rahbi thar a kai theih nan District Administration leh LADC- ten theihtawp an chhuah chhunzawm zel dawn tih sawiin, a taka bawhzui hunah VC, NGO,Kohhran leh mipuite pawh thahnem ngai taka sawrkar lo thawhpui zel turin a sawm nghal bawk a ni.

Pu C. Lalsawmzuala, Chief Executive Member, LADC chuan Lawngtlai khawpuiin hmel thar a hmuh a, bung thar a kai theihna turin sawrkar angin theihtawp chhuah zel a nih tur thu a sawi a. Khawpui hmasawnna chu mimal taka a vei thu tarlangin, ngaihtuahna sen thiam pawh a tul hle tiin, mawhphurhna neite theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a. Mimal, Pawl, Veng tinte leh Kohhran te pawh thawhpuiah a sawm nghal a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai khawpui hmasawnna tur kawng hrang hrangte sawiho a ni a. Pu C. Lawmsangzuala, Sanitation Officer, LADC chuan 'Beautification and Zero Waste Corner of Lawngtlai Town' tih hmangin Power Point Presentation - a pe a. Pi Margaret J. Vanlalremmawii, DPO, UD&PA, chuan Mizoram Sawrkar kaltlanga hmalakna tur hmachhawp awm hrang hrangte sawizauna a nei bawk a. Faina leh thianghlimna kawngah mipuite hnenah inzirtirna tha zawk kalpui a tul hle tih tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian VC leh YLA- ten a tam thei ang berin mahni veng theuhah lo puangzar thin se an ti a. Awareness Campaign - mumal taka kalpui ni se tih niin, bawlhlawh bawm tam zawk dah, Zero waste corner, Fencing, Street railings leh thut hahchawlhna siam pawh a pawimawh hle tih pawm tlangin, chak zawka hmalakna kalpui ni se an ti a ni. Khawpui cheimawi kawngah mumal zawkin hmalak ni se, cheimawi ngai hmun, kawtthlêr leh kawtchhuahah te a tul angin cheimawi hna kalpui ni se tih niin, Signage - pawh mumal taka tar thin ni se an ti, a ni.

Traffic Management- chungchang sawho niin, Pu David J. Byhnadaolai, Additional Superintendent of Police; leh Pu HC. Vanlalruatpuia, Transport Officer, LADC, hnen atangin ruahmanna kawng hrang hrang ngaihthlak a ni a. Motor Parking- bikah LADC chuan thuchhuah siam tawhin, VC leh YLA- te nena hmalak a nih tur thu ngaithlak a ni. Lirthei dah kawngah dan bawhchhiatna awm leh awm loh endik thin a tul hle tiin, chak taka Joint Inspection - kalpui ni se an ti a . Lirthei khalhtute zingah Traffic Rules- zawm lo leh hre famkimlo an tam hle tih pawm tlangin, hemi kawngah hian tan lak thar a tul hle tiin, Licence pekchhuah kawngah leh traffic rules- inzirtir kawngah theih ang anga hmalak ni se an ti a ni. Khawpui chhunga 'Motor Workshop ' awmin khawpui a tichep hle tiin, KMMTP- kawnga sawn tura hmalak ni se an ti a ni. Thutkhawm chuan hmalakna kawng hrang hrang awmte endik chu thil pawimawh takah pawmin, thla tin vawikhat endikna hna kalpui thin ni se an ti bawk a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian 'Traffic Enforcement Task Force Commitee' leh 'Clean Lawngtlai Committee' Member- te leh sawmbik te an telkim tha hle a, Pu K. Lalthanzara, ES,LADC -  chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: Siaha District chhunga Rualbanlo leh kum 60 tling chinte tana Assistive Device dil theih chungchanga DSWO, Siaha hriattirna
content:
292/2026-2027

Siaha the 27th April 2026:

HRIATTIRNA

May ni 13 & 16, 2026 hian ALIMCO (Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India) atangin rualbanlo leh upa kum 60 tling chinte tan Assistive Device (anmahni pui theitu tur hmanrua) dil theihna hun nei/hawng turin Siaha leh Zawngling-ah an lo kal dawn a. VC Ieh VLCC member tinte kan khua theuhah a hnuaia hmanrua tarlante hi mamawh an awm anih chuan min hrilhdarh sak turin ka ngen a che u.

Dil theihte :-1) Hearing Aid (Beng Dar)2) Braille Kit3) Sugamya Cane ( Mitdel tiang)4) Crutch (Zak dawh tiang)5) Smart Phone with Screen Reading6) Walking Stick (Tiang)7) Wheel Chair8) Tripod9) Rollator (Kal thei lo tan dawmchhan hmanga kal na)10) Tetrapod (Tiang, a hmawr pharh awm)11) Wheel Chair with Commode (Wheel chair ek na tur kua awm)12) Cerebral Palsy Chair (Cerebral Palsy nei, mahni a thu ngil thei lo tanpuitu)13) Lumbar Sacral Belt (Kawng nâ /kham hrenna)14) Knee Brace (Khup tha lo tuamna)15) Spinal Support - Hnungzang ruh (Spinal Cord na/kham hrenna)16) Silicon Foam.

A dil duhte chuan hengte hi ken tel tur a ni.

(i) Aadhaar Card (Xerox copy)(ii) UDID Card (Xerox) - Rualbanlo tân bik(iii) Income Proof Original (VC hnena lak tur) -a. Rualbanlo tan thlakhatah Rs. 22500/- aia tam lo.b. Kum 60 tling chin tan thlakhat ah Rs. 15000/-aia tam lo.

(iv) Passport size photo.

(v) Hearing Aid (Beng dar) dil tan - Audiogram/Audiologist Report (Xerox Copy), Audiologist hi a hmunah rawn tur a awm bawk ang.

(vi) Kal man (TA/DA) hi mahni a intum tur a ni e.

Siaha Block tan

A hun : Ni 13 - 14 May, 2026. @10:00 AMA hmun : I&PR Hall, Council Vaih, Siaha.

Tipa Block tanA hun : Ni 15 - 16 May, 2026. @ 10:00 AMA hmun : VC Conference Hall, Zyhno.

Attachment

title: SOCIAL WELFARE MINISTER PI LALRINPUII'N MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE & EMPOWERMENT BUATSAIH REVIEW MEETING 'CHINTAN SHIVIR' HMANPUI
content:
290/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 27th April, 2026 :Ni 24.4.2026 (Zirtawnpni) atanga hman tan, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of India buatsaih ni -3 chhung awh review meeting  - Chintan Shivir chu The Lalit Hotel, Chandigarh ah neih a ni a.  He hunah hian Mizoram aiawhin Social Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chu a tel.

Pi Lalrinpuii chuan, Ministry kalpui lai scheme hrang hrangte hlawk zawka kalpui a nih theihnan, theme bik neiin member te then hrangin, sawihona hun a hranpaa an hmang thin chu a hlawkpui  thu a sawi a. Mizoram lamah pawh hetiang anga meeting huaihawt ve ngei a duh thu a sawi.  Heng sawihona hrang hranga point pawimawh tarlan te chu ministry in uluk taka lo ngaihtuah turin a ngen a. India ram chu hnam ze hrang hrang awmna,  tawng leh sakhaw hrang hrang nei,  sik leh sa thleng pawha inang lo tak tak te chenkhawmna a nih avangin an danglamna te hre reng chunga, scheme leh project kalpui dan tur duang thin turin a ngen bawk.  Mizoram chu ram inlungrual leh tangrual an nih thu sawiin, thil thaah chuan mipui, Sawrkar leh tlawmngai pawl te tha taka an thawkho thin a; chu chuan ram mipuite tana hmalaknaah hlawhtlinna a thlen thin, a ti a. Mipui ten an ta neih tak tak theih scheme leh project siam a pawimawh thu Pi Lalrinpuii chuan a sawi a ni.

He review meeting - Chintan Shivir ah hian Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment hnuaia hmalakna hrang hrang thlirho a nih bakah hmachhawp hrang hrangte chak zawk leh tha zawka kalpui dan tur sawiho a ni a.  Social Justice Delivery kawnga mipuite nena tanhona tha zawk neih theih dan tur te mai bakah Public Private Partnership mode a kal chhoh dan tur kawng te ngaihtuah ho a ni.  MOSJE hnuaia hmalakna kalpui dan hrang hrang awlsam zawk dapin, a dawngtu tur tak te hnena Sawrkar hmalakna tha taka a thlen ngei theihna tura hmalak dan turte bakah, MOSJE hnuaia hmalakna hrang hrang chungchanga awareness tha zawk neih theih dan turte ngaihtuah ho a ni bawk. Ministry hnuaia hmalakna hrang hrang SAMAVESH portal te, NMBA 2.0 apps te, SETU apps te, SMILE apps te bakah beggar homes atana guidelines te tlangzarh a ni nghal bawk.

He hunah hian  Union Minister - Dr Virendra Kumar,  Union Minister of State Pu BL Verma te bakah state hrang hranga Social Welfare leh a kaihhnawih Department changtu Minister te leh Department Officials te an tel a. Mizoram atang pawhin Pi Lalzarmawii, IAS, Commissioner & Secretary; Pi Gracy Lalchhanzuali, Deputy Director, Social Welfare Department leh Pu H. Lalhruaitluanga, PS to Minister ten Minister hi an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment
